title: Not's Pack
description:
Not's Pack is an texturepack made by NotWNBM (me).
My texture pack is featuring alot of QoL changes and my personal favorites from diffrent texturepacks remade by me.
body:
# Can take a long time to load becouse of the visual enchantments!





![NotPack](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/964210171469512795/1128968876529565746/pack.png)



# Required Mods

-[CIT resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or Optifine 

and

-[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) or Optifine



-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# 📥 Installation guide
 
1. Download the "ɴᴏᴛ's ᴘᴀᴄᴋ [1.20.x]" file

2. Open minecraft files and put "ɴᴏᴛ's ᴘᴀᴄᴋ [1.20.x]" here:
 .minecraft/resourcepacks/

3.Launch minecraft and go to:

Options - Resource Packs
and pick the "ɴᴏᴛ's ᴘᴀᴄᴋ [1.20.x]"

4. Wait for the Texturepack to load and play !

----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# ⚙️ Features

Glowing Ore Borders

Dark Gui

Visual Enchantments

QoL changes 

Shorter swords
